description:
🕒 07:30–20:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-logcamp-bonomine-earlysummer/

THIS TOUR HAS BEEN CANCELLED BY THE ORGANIZER.

This tour aimed to climb to the summit of Bonomine (棒ノ嶺), learn the basics of stream hiking on the beautiful Shiratani-sawa route through gorge terrain, and enjoy a day in the river. Lunch and dinner would have included a boxed lunch and dinner prepared by a wild game restaurant, with education about game meat (jibier).

【Fee】¥23,000 per person (includes guide, lunch and dinner, insurance)

【Capacity】5 people

【Guide】Tsuyoshi Shinohara, Japan Mountain Guides Association member, Mountaineering Guide Stage III

【What to bring】20-liter backpack (with full waterproofing), complete stream-hiking gear, change of clothes, helmet, harness, mountaineering equipment, bus fare, bathing fee, train fare
location: 集合 西武池袋線「飯能駅」改札口
summary: ℹ️ RECRUITMENT CLOSED: Stream hiking at Bonomine and Gorge with wild game dinner — tour cancelled by organizer
